name: Ace Credit Repair Solutions LLC
description_short: ACE Credit Consulting offers credit repair through dispute letters, document preparation, and case management to remove negative items from credit reports.
description_long:
ACE Credit Consulting is a credit repair company that provides credit education and dispute services to help consumers improve their credit profiles and scores. The company claims to work with consumer, business, and mortgage credit, positioning itself as an experienced player in the credit repair space. According to their website, they prepare documentation and submit custom dispute letters on behalf of clients to credit agencies and creditors.

Their core service offering includes personalized dispute options, assignment of a dedicated case analyst and advisor, custom dispute letter preparation and submission, and 24/7 access to case status information. The company claims that 93% of clients see credit score increases of 10 points or more within the first 35 days, with an average 180-day improvement of 80 points. They also state clients successfully remove approximately 70% of negative items on average. Services address bankruptcies, foreclosures, collections, charge-offs, repossessions, medical bills, late payments, inquiries, judgments, tax liens, and student loans.

ACE differentiates itself by emphasizing no long-term binding contracts, reasonable fees, and hands-on involvement throughout the process. They stress that credit repair is legal and position themselves as consumer advocates working against creditors and bureaus. The company recommends credit monitoring as a supplementary service to track results and identify identity theft.

However, their claims warrant scrutiny. The statistical results cited (93% seeing 10+ point increases in 35 days, 70% item removal rates, 80-point average improvements) are presented without independent verification or methodology disclosure. Their assertion that removed items "cannot come back" contains significant caveats and contradicts established credit law. The company does not transparently disclose pricing, contract terms, or dispute success rates by item type, which are critical transparency issues in the credit repair industry.
pros: No long-term binding contracts—clients can work with the company until results are achieved rather than being locked into fixed periods
Claims of rapid initial results: 93% of clients reportedly see 10+ point score increases within 35 days
24/7 access to case status and account information online
Dedicated case analyst and advisor assigned to each client for personalized guidance
Covers multiple negative item types including bankruptcies, foreclosures, collections, medical bills, judgments, and tax liens
Emphasis on legal compliance and consumer advocacy positioning
Custom dispute letters prepared and submitted on client behalf rather than DIY template approach
cons: Pricing not transparently disclosed on the website; no fee schedule, package options, or cost breakdown provided
Statistical claims (93% success rate, 70% removal rate, 80-point averages) lack methodology, timeframe details, or independent verification
Misleading statement that removed items "cannot come back" contains vague exceptions and contradicts accurate credit law understanding
No clear explanation of dispute strategy, success rate by item type, or what happens if disputes are unsuccessful
Requires SMS/email consent with autodialer language as condition of contact; aggressive contact terms
best_for: Consumers with multiple negative items (collections, charge-offs, late payments) seeking professional dispute assistance
Individuals wanting hands-on case management and personalized dispute strategy without DIY letter writing
People seeking credit improvement for mortgage qualification or refinancing purposes
diagnosis: ACE Credit Consulting is best suited for consumers with multiple negative credit items who want professional dispute management and personalized case handling rather than DIY approaches. The main caveat is that their advertised success statistics lack independent verification and methodology transparency, their pricing model is not disclosed upfront, and claims about permanent item removal oversimplify credit law—making it essential to request detailed pricing and success rate information before engaging.
services: Credit education and legal guidance on credit repair rights
Personalized dispute strategy consultation and case analysis
Custom dispute letter preparation for credit bureaus and creditors
Document preparation and submission to credit agencies
Dedicated case analyst and advisor assignment
24/7 online case status and account access
Disputes for bankruptcies, foreclosures, and charge-offs
Collection account and medical bill dispute handling
Late payment and inquiry removal assistance
Tax lien and judgment dispute services
